message:
I’ll admit it—I might be a little over-prepared when it comes to my family’s emergency plans. Just the other week, I found myself rummaging through my go-bag, and I discovered enough granola bars to feed a small army! 😂 I mean, who knew that a simple trip to the store would turn into an impromptu snack supply for the next few months? 

But as I stood there, I realized how nice it is to have everything organized and ready to go. Sure, I might have a few extra items that could be considered a tad excessive, but knowing that my family is ready for anything—even if it’s just a long car ride—is a comforting feeling. 

If you ever feel like you might be in the same boat, this little refresher helped me a lot! What’s the most surprising thing you’ve packed in your emergency kit?
